summary: Backend + Frontend testing for Mindful Prints single-page site. All 5 backend pytest cases pass (root, POST /api/quote persistence, validation for missing fields + invalid email, GET list sort). Frontend loads, hero renders correct headline 'Precision Printing & Protective Packaging.', all sections/tiles/products/pillars/nav/CTA/footer present. Nav smooth-scroll works, capability tiles scroll to their product deep-dives, empty form submit is blocked with error indication and no API call, full form submission POSTs to /api/quote and shows enquiry-success state, back-to-top button smooth-scrolls to top.

issues: CORS console error for external ap.emergent.sh/dead-clicks-autocapture.js (multiple '*,*' Access-Control-Allow-Origin) — external analytics script, not from this app but visible in console.

testid_inconsistencies.issue: 'Food & Beverage' produces data-testid='industry-food---beverage' (three dashes from space,&,space) instead of the expected 'industry-food-beverage' per the review request. The generation regex replaces every non-[a-z] char individually. Consider slugifying (collapse repeated dashes) or setting explicit keys. All 8 industries render correctly visually; only the testid string differs.

action_items: Optional: Fix testid slug in IndustriesMarquee so 'Food & Beverage' → 'industry-food-beverage' (collapse repeated '-' or use explicit slug map) to match the spec.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: POST /api/quote correctly returns 201 with EmailStr validation and stores ISO string of created_at. Good.
GET /api/quote correctly excludes _id and sorts created_at desc.
CORS is set with allow_credentials=True and allow_origins='*' which is technically invalid but browsers still permit non-credentialed calls; consider tightening origins for production.
Frontend: EnquiryForm posts to `${REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL}/api/quote` correctly. Good.

success_rate.frontend: ~98% (only minor testid slug mismatch for Food & Beverage)

seed_data_creation: Created 2 TEST_-prefixed quote records via API during testing; safe to leave (prefixed for identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enquiry form uses shadcn Select — must click [data-testid='select-product'] then click a [data-testid^='select-option-'] with force=True. Form fields use data-testid input-name/company/email/phone/input-message. Lenis smooth scroll takes ~1-2s to settle. IndustriesMarquee generates industry-* testids via regex which produces 'industry-food---beverage' for 'Food & Beverage'.
rca_of_the_issue: IndustriesMarquee.jsx line 92: data-testid={`industry-${it.k.toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z]/g, '-')}`} — replaces each individual non-a-z char with a single dash, resulting in triple dashes for 'Food & Beverage'. Fix: chain .replace(/-+/g,'-').replace(/^-|-$/g,'') or provide explicit slugs.
